apiContracts.name: UpsertLlmSuggestionFeedback
notes: Should update the existing row instead of creating duplicates.
Should reuse the existing `LlmSuggestionsController` instead of adding a separate feedback controller.

requestModels.name: UpsertLlmSuggestionFeedbackRequest
rules: `Notes` la optional, trim whitespace, gioi han do dai hop ly.
Khong require `RowVersion` trong request cho FE-16 v1; server xu ly upsert va cap nhat `RowVersion` noi bo.

internalServices.name: ILlmSuggestionFeedbackContextService
internalServices.purpose: Aggregate feedback by suite + endpoint into sanitized prompt context and stable feedback fingerprint.

rules: Indexes at least on `(TestSuiteId, EndpointId)` and `FeedbackSignal`.
FK to `LlmSuggestion` with cascade delete is acceptable because feedback lifecycle follows suggestion lifecycle.
`FeedbackSignal` nen duoc luu theo string-backed enum.
`RowVersion` nen theo application-managed concurrency pattern giong `LlmSuggestion`.
